generation_inputs.topic_cluster: Implementing automatic caching with single cache_control field

post.topic: implementing cache_control parameter for token savings
post.hook: How to cut Claude API costs by 90% with one simple parameter
post.caption:
The cache_control parameter is a game-changer for reducing Claude API costs. Instead of re-processing the same context repeatedly, you can cache frequently used content like system prompts, documentation, or code bases.

Just add "cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"} to any message content. Claude will automatically cache that content for future requests in the same conversation, dramatically reducing token usage.

Perfect for chatbots, code review tools, or any app that references the same large context multiple times. Your API bills will thank you! 💡

Save this for your next Claude integration project.
